name: opsboard-workflow
description: Git-native OPSBOARD delivery with human-approval packages, gated sprints, worktrees, and durable evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Human-approval packages, gated sprints, worktrees, and durable OPSBOARD evidence.
interface.longDescription: Initialize the Git and git-bug contract, auto-build human-approval packages (Function Specs, flow schematics, mocks, and mock interaction videos), plan approval-gated sprints, work in isolated worktrees, record factual status mapped to verification matrices, capture review evidence, and register a read-only OPSBOARD dashboard source.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repository for the Git-native OPSBOARD workflow.
Turn this brief into an approval-gated OPSBOARD sprint proposal with a full human-approval package.
Prepare an approved OPSBOARD issue in an isolated external worktree.
